sentence: 政府在郊区新建了几个居民点，缓解市区压力。
pinyin: Zhèngfǔ zài jiāoqū xīn jiàn le jǐ gè jūmíndiǎn, huǎnjiě shìqū yālì.
english: The government built several new residential areas in the suburbs to ease pressure on the city center.

sentence: 这辆卡车装的是柴油机，油耗比较低。
pinyin: Zhè liàng kǎchē zhuāng de shì chái yóu jī, yóuhào bǐjiào dī.
english: This truck is fitted with a diesel engine, so fuel consumption is relatively low.

sentence: 她申请到了学校的奖学金。
pinyin: Tā shēn qǐng dào le xué xiào de jiǎng xué jīn.
english: She successfully applied for a scholarship from the school.

sentence: 这幅图案左右对称，很好看。
pinyin: Zhè fú tú'àn zuǒyòu duìchèn, hěn hǎokàn.
english: This pattern is symmetrical left and right—it looks great.

sentence: 我已经在网上订好了去北京的机票。
pinyin: Wǒ yǐ jīng zài wǎng shàng dìng hǎo le qù Běi jīng de jī piào.
english: I've already booked my plane ticket to Beijing online.
